expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, and visible failure or recovery outcomes
expectations.evidence: The provided outputs do not include any shipment-checkpoint artifact content demonstrating explicit coverage of the three focus areas. execution_notes.md states: "No run directory artifacts were provided (no `context/checkpoint_audit_BCED-1719.md`, no `context/checkpoint_delta_BCED-1719.md`, no Phase 5b draft...)" and result.md concludes there is "no artifact where such coverage would be explicitly enumerated" for panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, or visible failure/recovery outcomes.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: Phase 5b alignment requires producing Phase 5b outputs (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta with final disposition, and phase5b QA plan draft). result.md states: "None of the required Phase 5b artifacts are present" and execution_notes.md reiterates missing `context/checkpoint_audit_BCED-1719.md`, `context/checkpoint_delta_BCED-1719.md`, and Phase 5b draft; therefore the outputs cannot be considered aligned with phase5b requirements.
